issues.sample: Back window shattered for no reason. Vehicle parked on property and was fine when we came home last night in another vehicle and parked behind it. Online found out this has been happening  where the back window spontaneous combustion for no reason.  Checked property surveillance

narrative.headline: What 2024 Infiniti Qx80 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility (100% of reports).
